arabic text: حَدِيثُ اَلكِسَاء
english translation text:
HADITH-E-KISA
EVENT OF THE CLOAK

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: عَنْ فاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرآءِ عَلَيْهَا السَّلاَمُ
english translation text: Fatimatuz-Zahra...

arabic text: بِنْتِ رَسُولِ اللّهِ أَنَّها قالَتْ
english translation text: ...the daughter of the Prophet, is to have thus related(an event):

arabic text: دَخَلَ عَلَيَّ أَبِي رَسُولُ اللّهِ فِي بَعْضِ الْاَيَّامِ
english translation text: My father, the Prophet of Allah, came to my house one day and said to me

arabic text: فَقالَ السَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فاطِمَةُ
english translation text: "Peace be on you, Fatimah"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ عَلَيْكَ السَّلَامُقالَ: إِنِّي أَجِدُ فِي بَدَنِي ضَعْفا
english translation text: I replied: "And upon you be peace“ Then he said: "I feel weakness in my body"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أُعِيذُكَ بِاللّهِ يَا أَبَتاهُ مِنَ الضَّعْفِ
english translation text: I said: "Allah protects you from weakness, father"

arabic text: فَقالَ يَا فاطِمَةُ اِئتِينِي بِالْكِساءِ الْـيَمَانِي فَغَطَّينِي بِه
english translation text: He said: "Fatimah, please bring Yemeni cloak and cover me with it"

arabic text: فَأَتَيْتُهُ بِلْكِساءِ الْـيَمَانِي فَغَطَّيْتُهُ بِهِ
english translation text: So, I brought the Yemeni cloak and covered him with it.

arabic text: وَصِرْتُ أَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِ وَإِذا وَجْهُهُ يَتَلاَءْلاَءُ كَأَنَّهُ الْبَدْرُ
english translation text: Then, I looked at him and saw that his face was shining like a full moon...

arabic text: فِي لَيْلَة تَمامِهِ وَكَمالِهِ
english translation text: ...with its glory and splendour

arabic text: فَمَا كانَتْ إِلاَّ ساعَةً وَإِذا بِوَلَدِيَ الْحَسَنِ قَدْ أَقْبَلَ
english translation text: After a while, my son Hassan came in...

arabic text: وَقالَ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا أُمَّاهُ
english translation text: ...and said: "Peace be on you, mother"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ يَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِي وَثَمَرَةَ فُؤَادِي
english translation text: I replied: "And upon you peace, O light of my eyes, and the delight of my heart"

arabic text: فَقَالَ: يَا أُمَّاهُ إِنَّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
english translation text: He then said : "Mother! I smell a fragrance so sweet and so pure ...

arabic text: كَأَنَّها رائِحَةُ جَدِّي رَسُولِ اللّهِ
english translation text: ...as that of my grandfather, the Prophet of Allah"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ إِنَّ جَدَّكَ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: I replied: "Yes. Your grandfather is lying underneath the cloak"

arabic text: فَأَقْبَلَ الْحَسَنُ نَحْوَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: Hassan went near the cloak...

arabic text: وَقالَ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا جَدَّاهُ
english translation text: ..and said: "Peace be on you, my grandfather..

arabic text: يَا رَسُوْلَ اللّهِ أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَدْخُلَ مَعَكَ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...the Prophet of Allah; May I enter the cloak with you?"

arabic text: فَقالَ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ يَا وَلَدِي وَيَا صَاحِبَ حَوْضِي
english translation text: He replied: "And upon you peace, my son and the master of my fountain (Kauthar)..

arabic text: قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَ فَدَخَلَ مَعَهُ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ..you are given the permission to enter"So, Hasan entered the cloak with him.

arabic text: فَمَا كَانَتْ إِلاَّ سَاعَةً وَإِذَا بِوَلَدِيَ الْحُسَيْنِ قَدْ أَقْبَلَ
english translation text: After a while, my Hussain came in...

arabic text: وَقَالَ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا أُمَّاهُ
english translation text: ..and said: "Peace be on you, mother"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ يَا وَلَدِي وَيَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِي وَثَمَرَةَ فُؤَادِي
english translation text: I replied: "And upon you peace, O light of my eyes, and the delight of my heart"

arabic text: فَقَالَ لِي يَا أُمَّاهُ إِنَّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
english translation text: He then said: "Mother! I smell a sweet fragrance...

arabic text: كَأَنَّها رائِحَةُ جَدِّي رَسُولِ اللّهُ
english translation text: ...like that of my grandfather, the Prophet of Allah"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ إِنَّ جَدَّكَ وَأَخاكَ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: I replied: "Yes. Your grandfather and your brother are lying underneath the cloak"

arabic text: فَدَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ نَحْوَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: Hussain stepped towards the cloak...

arabic text: وَقالَ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا جَدَّاهُ
english translation text: ...and said: "Peace be on you, my grandfather...

arabic text: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَنِ اخْتارَهُ اللّهُ
english translation text: ... Peace be on you, the Chosen of Allah..

arabic text: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُما تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: May I enter the cloak with you?"

arabic text: فَقالَ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ يَا وَلَدِي وَيَا شَافِعَ أُمَّتِي
english translation text: He replied: "And upon you peace, my son and interceder of my followers...

arabic text: قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَفَدَخَلَ مَعَهُمَا تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...you are given the permission to enter".So, Hussain entered the cloak with them

arabic text: فَأَ قْبَلَ عِنْدَ ذلِكَ أَبُوْ الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ
english translation text: After a while, Abul Hassan, Ali bin Abi Talib came in...

arabic text: وَقَالَ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُوْلِ اللّهِ
english translation text: ...came in and said: "Peace be on you, O daughter of the Prophet of Allah "

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ يَا أَبَا الْحَسَنِ وَيَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: replied: "And upon you peace, O father of Hassan, and the Commander of the faithful"

arabic text: فَقَالَ: يَا فَاطِمَةُ إِنِّي أَشَمُّ عِنْدَكِ رَائِحَةً طَيِّبَةً
english translation text: He then said: "Fatimah! I smell a sweet fragrance...

arabic text: كَأَنَّها رَائِحَةُ أَخِي وَابْنِ عَمِّي رَسُوْلِ اللّهِ
english translation text: ...like that of my brother, (my cousin), the Prophet of Allah"

arabic text: فَقُلْتُ: نَعَمْ هَا هُوَ مَعَ وَلَدَيْكَ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: replied: "Yes. He is underneath the cloak with your two sons"

arabic text: فَأَقْبَلَ عَلِيٌّ نَحْوَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: So, Ali went near the cloak ...

arabic text: وَقَالَ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُوْلَ اللّهِ
english translation text: ...and said: "Peace be on you, Prophet of Allah...

arabic text: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُمْ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...May I enter the cloak with you?"

arabic text: قَالَ لَهُ وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلامُ
english translation text: He replied: "And upon you peace...

arabic text: يَا أَخِي ويَا وَصِيِّي وَخَلِيفَتِي وَصَاحِبَ لِوَائِي
english translation text: ...my brother, my legatee, my successor, and my standard bearer,

arabic text: أَذِنْتُ لَكَ قَدْفَدَخَلَ عَلِيٌّ تَحْتَ الْكِساءِ
english translation text: you are given the permission to enter"So, Ali entered the cloak with them.

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَتَيْتُ نَحْوَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: Then I stepped forward...

arabic text: وَقُلْتُ: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَتَاَهُيَا رَسُوْلَ اللّهِ
english translation text: ...and said: "Peace be on you, my father, O Prophet of Allah...

arabic text: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَكُونَ مَعَكُمْتَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...May I enter the cloak with you?"

arabic text: قَالَ: وَعَلَيْكِ السَّلاَمُ يَا بِنْتِي وَيَا بِضْعَتِي
english translation text: He replied: "And upon you peace, my daughter, O part of my self...

arabic text: قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكِ فَدَخَلْتُ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...you are given the permission to enter"

arabic text: فَلَمَّا اكْتَمَلْنا جَمِيعاً تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: So, I entered the cloak with them. Getting together underneath the cloak,

arabic text: أَخَذَ أَبِي رَسُولُ اللّه بِطَرَفَي الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: my father, the Prophet of Allah, held the two ends of the cloak...

arabic text: وَأَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ الْـيُمْنَى إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَقالَ
english translation text: ...and raised his right hand towards the heavens and prayed:

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَؤُلاءِ أَهْلُ بَيْتِي وَخَاصَّتِي وَحَامَّتِي
english translation text: Household (Ahlul-Bayt). They are my confidants and my supporters

arabic text: لَحْمُهُمْ لَحْمِي وَدَمُهُمْ دَمِي
english translation text: Their flesh is my flesh and their blood is my blood.

arabic text: يُؤْلِمُنِي مَا يُؤْلِمُهُمْ، وَيَحْزُنُنِي مَا يَحْزُنُهُمْ
english translation text: Whoever hurts them, hurts me too. Whoever displeases them, displeased me too.

arabic text: أَنَا حَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَهُمْ
english translation text: I am at war with those at war with them.

arabic text: وَسِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمَهُمْ ،وَعَدُوٌّ لِمَنْ عَادَاهُمْ
english translation text: I am at peace with those at peace with them. I am an enemy of their enemies and

arabic text: وَمُحِبٌّ لِمَنْ أَحَبَّهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ مِنِّي وَأَنَا مِنْهُمْ
english translation text: I am friend of their friends.They are from me and I am from them.

arabic text: فَاجْعَلْ صَلَوَاتِكَ وَبَرَكَاتِكَ وَرَحْمَتَكَ
english translation text: O Allah! Bestow Your Blessings

arabic text: وَغُفْرَانَكَ وَرِضْوَانَكَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَيْهِمْ
english translation text: Benevolence, Forgiveness and Your pleasure upon me and upon them.

arabic text: وَأَذْهِبْ عَنْهُمُ الرِّجْسَوَطَهِّرْهُمْ تَطْهِيراً.
english translation text: And remove impurity from them and keep them thoroughly pure"

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: فَقَالَ اللّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
english translation text: Then the Lord, Almighty Allah said

arabic text: يَا مَلاَئِكَتِي وَيَا سُكَّانَ سَمَاوَاتِي إِنَّـِي مَا خَلَقْتُ سَمَاءً مَبْنِيَّةً
english translation text: "O My angels! O Residents of My Heavens,

arabic text: وَلاَ أَرْضاً مَدْحِيَّةً وَلاَ قَمَراً مُنِيراً وَلاَ شَمْساً مُضِيئَةً
english translation text: verily, I have not created the erected Sky, the stretched earth, the illuminated moon, the bright sun,

arabic text: وَلاَ فَلَكاً يَدُورُ وَلاَ بَحْراً يَجْرِي وَلاَ فُلْكاً يَسْرِي
english translation text: the rotating planets, the flowing seas and the sailing ships...

arabic text: إِلاَّ فِي مَحَبَّةِ هَؤلاءِ لْخَمْسَةِ الَّذِينَ هُمْ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: ...but for the love of these Five lying underneath the cloak"

arabic text: فَقَالَ الاْأمِينُ جَبْرائِيلُيَارَبِّ وَمَنْ تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: Gabriel, the trusted Angel, asked: "Who is under the cloak?"

arabic text: فَقالَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ هُمْ أَهْلُ بَيْتِ النُّبُوَّةِ وَمَعْدِنُ الرِّسَالَةِ
english translation text: The Almighty answered: "They are the Household of the Prophet and the assets of Prophet hood...

arabic text: هُمْ فَاطِمَةُ وَأَبُوهَا وَبَعْلُهَا وَبَنُوهَا
english translation text: ...They are: Fatimah, her father, her husband and her sons."

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: فَقالَ جَبْرَائِيلُ: يَارَبِّ
english translation text: Gabriel said: "O Lord...

arabic text: أَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَهْبِطَ إِلَى الأَرْضِ ِلأَكُوْنَ مَعَهُمْ سَادِسًا
english translation text: ...May I fly to earth to be the sixth of them?"

arabic text: فَقالَ اللّهُ: نَعَمْ قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَفَهَبَطَ الأَمِيْنُ جَبْرَآئِيْلُ وَقَالَ
english translation text: Allah replied: "Yes. You are given the permission"Gabriel, the trusted, landed near them and said:

arabic text: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you O Prophet of Allah,

arabic text: الْعَلِيُّ الاَعْلَى يَقْرَئُكَ السَّلاَمَ وَيَخُصُّكَ بِالتَّحِيَّةِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ
english translation text: "The Most High and All-high (Lord) conveys to you His greeting, expresses His special greeting and honouring to you

arabic text: وَعِزَّتِيْ وَجَلاَلِي  : وَيَقُولُ لَكَ
english translation text: "By My Honour and Glory...

arabic text: إِنَّي مَاخَلَقْتُ سَمَاءً مَبْنِيَّةً
english translation text: O Residents of My Heavens...

arabic text: وَلاَ أَرْضاً مَدْحِيَّةً وَلاَ قَمَراً مُنِيراً وَلاَ شَمْساً مُضِيئَةً
english translation text: ...verily, I have not created the erected Sky, the stretched earth, the illuminated moon, the bright sun,

arabic text: وَلاَ فَلَكاً يَدُورُ وَلاَ بَحْراً يَجْرِي وَلاَ فُلْكاً يَسْرِي
english translation text: the rotating planets, the flowing seas and the sailing ships...

arabic text: إِلاَّ لِاَجْلِكُمْ وَمَحَبَّتِكُمْ
english translation text: ...but for your sake and love"

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَذِنَ لِي أَنْ أَدْخُلَ مَعَكُمْ فَهَلْ تَأْذَنُ لِي يَا رَسُولَ اللّه
english translation text: God has given me permission to enter the cloak with you. May I join you, O Prophet of Allah?"

arabic text: فَقالَ رَسُولُ اللّه: وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ يَاأَمِينَ وَحْيِ اللّهِ
english translation text: The Prophet replied: "And peace be on you, O trusted bearer of Allah's Revelations!

arabic text: إِنَّهُ نَعَمْ قَدْ أَذِنْتُ لَكَ
english translation text: ...you are granted the permission".

arabic text: فَدَخَلَ جَبْرائِيلُ مَعَنَا تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: So, Gabriel entered the cloak with us..

arabic text: فَقَالَ ِلأَبِيْ إِنَّ اللّهَ قَدْ أَوْحَى إِلَيْكُمْ يَقُولُ
english translation text: ...and said to my father: "Allah sends His Revelations to you

arabic text: إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ اللّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمُ الرِّجْسَ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِوَيُطَهِّرَكُمْ تَطْهِيراً
english translation text: "Verily Allah's desire is to remove blemish from you, O People of Household (Ahlul-Bayt) ...and purify you with a perfect purification

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ ِلأَبِيْ: يَا رَسُولَ اللّهِ
english translation text: Then Ali said to my father: "O Prophet of Allah...

arabic text: أَخْبِرْنِىْ مَا لِجُلُوسِنَا هَذَا تَحْتَ الْكِسَآءِ مِنَ الْفَضْلِ عِنْدَ اللّهُ
english translation text: ...tell me what significance has Allah given for getting together underneath this cloak?"

arabic text: فَقالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: The Prophet replied...

arabic text: وَالَّذِي بَعَثَنِي بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيَّاً وَاصْطَفانِي بِالرِّسالَةِ نَجِيّاً
english translation text: "By Him who rightfully appointed me a Prophet and chose me a Messenger for the salvation of mankind.

arabic text: مَا ذُكِرَ خَبَرُنا هذَا فِي مَحْفِلٍ مِنْ مَحافِلِ أَهْلِ أْلأَرْضِ
english translation text: whenever and wherever...

arabic text: وَفِيهِ جَمْعٌ مِنْ شِيعَتِنا وَمُحِّبِينَا
english translation text: ...and assembly of our followers and friends

arabic text: وَنَزَلَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ الرَّحْمَةُ اِلاَّوَحَفَّتْ بِهِمُ الْمَلائِكَةُ
english translation text: Allah will bestow on them His Blessings and Mercy;angels will encircle them...

arabic text: وَاسْتَغْفَرَتْ لَهُمْ اِلئ اَنْ يَّتَفَرَّقُوْا
english translation text: ...asking Allah the remission of their sins until the assembly disperses

arabic text: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ
english translation text: So Ali said...

arabic text: إِذنْ وَاللّهِ فُزْنَا وَفَازَ شِيْعَتُنَا وَرَبِّ الْكَعْبَةِ
english translation text: ..."Verily, by the Lord of Kaaba! we and our followers are the winners"

arabic text: فَقالَ أَبِى رَسُولُ اللّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: يَا عَلِيُّ
english translation text: Then my father replied...

arabic text: وَالَّذِي بَعَثَنِي بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيّاً وَاصْطَفَانِي بِالرِّسالَةِ نَجِيّاً
english translation text: ..."By Him who rightfully appointed me a Prophet and chose me a Messenger for the salvation of mankind,

arabic text: مَا ذُكِرَ خَبَرُنا هذَا فِي مَحْفِلٍ مِنْ مَحَافِلِ أَهْلِ اْلأَرْضِ
english translation text: whenever and wherever...

arabic text: وَفِيهِ جَمْعٌ مِنْ شِيعَتِنا وَمُحِبِّينا
english translation text: ...an assembly of our followers and friends

arabic text: وَفِيهِمْ مَهْمُومٌ إِلاَّ وَفَرَّجَ اللّهُ هَمَّهُ
english translation text: mentions this event,there shall remain none grieved but Allah will remove their grief...

arabic text: وَلاَ مَغْمُوْمٌ إِلاَّ وَكَشَفَ اللّهُ غَمَّهُ
english translation text: ...there shall remain none distressed but Allah will dispel their distress,

arabic text: وَلاَ طالِبُ حَاجَةٍ إِلاَّ وَقَضَى اللّهُ حَاجَتَهُ
english translation text: there shall remain none wish-seeker but Allah will grant their wish.

arabic text: فَقالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ
english translation text: Ali happily said...

arabic text: إِذوَاللّهِ فُزْنَا وَسُعِدْنَا وَكَذلِكَ
english translation text: ..."Verily, by the Lord of Kaaba!...

arabic text: شِيعَتُنَا فَازُوْا وَسُعِدُوْا فِي الدُّنْيا وَٱلآخِرَةِ وَرَبِّ الْكَعْبَةِ
english translation text: ...we and our followers are the winners and the blessed, in this world and the next"

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
